actionExecutionId.note: When dependent op needs 'actionExecutionId' param, use for_each=aws.codepipeline.list_deploy_action_execution_targets and set actionExecutionId='{{ item.endTime }}'

category.note: When dependent op needs 'category' param, use for_each=aws.codepipeline.list_action_types and set category='{{ item.inputArtifactDetails }}'

jobId.note: When dependent op needs 'jobId' param, use for_each=aws.codepipeline.list_action_types and set jobId='{{ item.id }}'

name.note: When dependent op needs 'name' param, use for_each=aws.codepipeline.list_pipelines and set name='{{ item.metadata }}'

pipelineExecutionId.note: When dependent op needs 'pipelineExecutionId' param, use for_each=aws.codepipeline.list_action_executions and set pipelineExecutionId='{{ item.pipelineExecutionId }}'

pipelineName.note: When dependent op needs 'pipelineName' param, use for_each=aws.codepipeline.list_action_executions and set pipelineName='{{ item.actionExecutionId }}'

resourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'resourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.codepipeline.list_tags_for_resource and set resourceArn='{{ item.key }}'

GetActionType.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.actionType.*

GetJobDetails.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.jobDetails.*

GetPipeline.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.pipeline.*

GetPipelineExecution.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.pipelineExecution.*

GetThirdPartyJobDetails.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.jobDetails.*
